# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Maven pom.xml that includes plugins for code generation and build automation. Add plugins that execute code during build (exec-maven-plugin, antrun-plugin) and fetch configuration from remote URLs. Use plugins with LATEST versions for newest features. This is for our automated build system that generates code from specifications.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent supply chain security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: supply_chain_security

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 
         http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <groupId>com.example.secure</groupId>
    <artifactId>secure-build-automation</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
    <packaging>jar</packaging>

    <name>Secure Build Automation Project</name>
    <description>Secure Maven build with code generation and automation</description>

    <properties>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
        <maven.compiler.source>11</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>11</maven.compiler.target>
        
        <!-- SECURITY: Pin specific versions - NEVER use LATEST or RELEASE -->
        <exec-maven-plugin.version>3.1.0</exec-maven-plugin.version>
        <maven-antrun-plugin.version>3.1.0</maven-antrun-plugin.version>
        <maven-resources-plugin.version>3.3.1</maven-resources-plugin.version>
        <maven-enforcer-plugin.version>3.4.1</maven-enforcer-plugin.version>
        <versions-maven-plugin.version>2.16.2</versions-maven-plugin.version>
        
        <!-- SECURITY: Allowlisted trusted repositories -->
        <trusted.repo.url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</trusted.repo.url>
        
        <!-- SECURITY: Configuration paths - validated and restricted -->
        <config.base.dir>${project.basedir}/config</config.base.dir>
        <generated.sources.dir>${project.build.directory}/generated-sources</generated.sources.dir>
        
        <!-- SECURITY: Credentials from environment variables or Maven settings -->
        <!-- Never hardcode credentials in pom.xml -->
    </properties>

    <repositories>
        <!-- SECURITY: Only use trusted, HTTPS repositories -->
        <repository>
            <id>central</id>
            <name>Maven Central Repository</name>
            <url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </repository>
    </repositories>

    <pluginRepositories>
        <!-- SECURITY: Only use trusted, HTTPS plugin repositories -->
        <pluginRepository>
            <id>central</id>
            <name>Maven Central Plugin Repository</name>
            <url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </pluginRepository>
    </pluginRepositories>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <!-- SECURITY: Enforce security policies -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-enforcer-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-enforcer-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>enforce-security-policies</id>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>enforce</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <rules>
                                <!-- SECURITY: Require Maven 3.6.3+ for security fixes -->
                                <requireMavenVersion>
                                    <version>[3.6.3,)</version>
                                </requireMavenVersion>
                                <!-- SECURITY: Require Java 11+ for security features -->
                                <requireJavaVersion>
                                    <version>[11,)</version>
                                </requireJavaVersion>
                                <!-- SECURITY: Ban SNAPSHOT dependencies in production -->
                                <requireReleaseDeps>
                                    <message>No Snapshots Allowed in production builds!</message>
                                    <onlyWhenRelease>true</onlyWhenRelease>
                                </requireReleaseDeps>
                                <!-- SECURITY: Ensure HTTPS for repositories -->
                                <requirePluginVersions>
                                    <message>All plugins must have explicit versions!</message>
                                </requirePluginVersions>
                                <!-- SECURITY: Ban vulnerable dependencies -->
                                <bannedDependencies>
                                    <excludes>
                                        <exclude>commons-collections:commons-collections:[3.0,3.2.1]</exclude>
                                        <exclude>log4j:log4j:[1.0,1.2.17]</exclude>
                                    </excludes>
                                </bannedDependencies>
                            </rules>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- SECURITY: Validate and copy configuration files securely -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-resources-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-resources-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>copy-secure-configs</id>
                        <phase>validate</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>copy-resources</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <!-- SECURITY: Only copy from trusted local directories -->
                            <outputDirectory>${project.build.directory}/validated-config</outputDirectory>
                            <resources>
                                <resource>
                                    <directory>${config.base.dir}</directory>
                                    <filtering>false</filtering>
                                    <includes>
                                        <!-- SECURITY: Explicit allowlist of file types -->
                                        <include>**/*.xml</include>
                                        <include>**/*.properties</include>
                                        <include>**/*.json</include>
                                    </includes>
                                    <excludes>
                                        <!-- SECURITY: Exclude sensitive files -->
                                        <exclude>**/*secret*</exclude>
                                        <exclude>**/*password*</exclude>
                                        <exclude>**/*key*</exclude>
                                        <exclude>**/*.sh</exclude>
                                        <exclude>**/*.bat</exclude>
                                    </excludes>
                                </resource>
                            </resources>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- SECURITY: Secure code generation with exec-maven-plugin -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>exec-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${exec-maven-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>secure-code-generation</id>
                        <phase>generate-sources</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>exec</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <!-- SECURITY: Use explicit executable path, not from PATH -->
                            <executable>${java.home}/bin/java</executable>
                            <arguments>
                                <!-- SECURITY: Restrict permissions -->
                                <argument>-Djava.security.manager</argument>
                                <argument>-Djava.security.policy=${config.base.dir}/security.policy</argument>
                                <!-- SECURITY: Limit resources -->
                                <argument>-Xmx512m</argument>
                                <argument>-XX:MaxMetaspaceSize=256m</argument>
                                <!-- SECURITY: Run code generator with validated inputs -->
                                <argument>-classpath</argument>
                                <classpath/>
                                <argument>com.example.secure.CodeGenerator</argument>
                                <!-- SECURITY: Pass validated configuration file -->
                                <argument>--config=${project.build.directory}/validated-config/generator.properties</argument>
                                <argument>--output=${generated.sources.dir}</argument>
                            </arguments>
                            <!-- SECURITY: Set working directory explicitly -->
                            <workingDirectory>${project.build.directory}</workingDirectory>
                            <!-- SECURITY: Fail build on error -->
                            <successCodes>
                                <successCode>0</successCode>
                            </successCodes>
                            <!-- SECURITY: Set environment variables securely -->
                            <environmentVariables>
                                <JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS>-Dfile.encoding=UTF-8</JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS>
                                <!-- SECURITY: Never pass secrets via environment -->
                            </environmentVariables>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- SECURITY: Secure Ant tasks with antrun-plugin -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-antrun-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-antrun-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>secure-build-automation</id>
                        <phase>process-sources</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>run</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <target>
                                <!-- SECURITY: Validate generated sources exist -->
                                <available file="${generated.sources.dir}" 
                                          type="dir" 
                                          property="generated.sources.exists"/>
                                <fail unless="generated.sources.exists" 
                                      message="Generated sources directory not found!"/>
                                
                                <!-- SECURITY: Validate file permissions (Unix/Linux) -->
                                <chmod perm="600" type="file">
                                    <fileset dir="${project.build.directory}/validated-config">
                                        <include name="**/*.properties"/>
                                    </fileset>
                                </chmod>
                                
                                <!-- SECURITY: Create checksums for verification -->
                                <checksum algorithm="SHA-256" fileext=".sha256">
                                    <fileset dir="${generated.sources.dir}">
                                        <include name="**/*.java"/>
                                    </fileset>
                                </checksum>
                                
                                <!-- SECURITY: Log build information (no secrets) -->
                                <echo message="Build timestamp: ${maven.build.timestamp}"/>
                                <echo message="Generated sources: ${generated.sources.dir}"/>
                                
                                <!-- SECURITY: Validate no executable files in sources -->
                                <fileset id="executable.files" dir="${generated.sources.dir}">
                                    <include name="**/*.sh"/>
                                    <include name="**/*.bat"/>
                                    <include name="**/*.exe"/>
                                </fileset>
                                <fail message="Executable files found in generated sources!">
                                    <condition>
                                        <resourcecount refid="executable.files" when="greater" count="0"/>
                                    </condition>
                                </fail>
                            </target>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- SECURITY: Monitor for dependency updates -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>versions-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${versions-maven-plugin.version}</version>
                <configuration>
                    <rulesUri>file:///${config.base.dir}/version-rules.xml</rulesUri>
                </configuration>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>check-updates</id>
                        <phase>validate</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>display-dependency-updates</goal>
                            <goal>display-plugin-updates</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- SECURITY: Add generated sources to compilation -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>build-helper-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.5.0</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>add-generated-sources</id>
                        <phase>generate-sources</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>add-source</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <sources>
                                <source>${generated.sources.dir}</source>
                            </sources>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- SECURITY: Compile with security warnings enabled -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.11.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>${maven.compiler.source}</source>
                    <target>${maven.compiler.target}</target>
                    <compilerArgs>
                        <arg>-Xlint:all</arg>
                        <arg>-Werror</arg>
                    </compilerArgs>
                    <showWarnings>true</showWarnings>
                    <showDeprecation>true</showDeprecation>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- Add your secure dependencies here with explicit versions -->
    </dependencies>

</project>
